title: The big tits of Mr. CGA rub cocks of Mr. VGA to persuade the Hercules graphic card
description:
Digital generation loss experiment.

I rendered the original videos a bit over 300 times. For every tenth re-rendering, I stretched the video to be 1/30 frame longer. Sometimes, I didn't count right and so I re-rendered more than 300 times.
